File Information
Collection: Weather API
Collection Description
# Introduction WeatherAPI.com provides access to weather and geo data via a JSON/XML restful API. It allows developers to create desktop, web and mobile applications using this data very easy. We provide following data through our API: - Real-time weather - 14 day weather forecast - Historical Weather - Marine Weather and Tide Data - Future Weather (Upto 365 days ahead) - Daily and hourly intervals - 15 min interval (Enterprise only) - Astronomy - Time zone - Location data - Sports - Search or Autocomplete API - Weather Alerts - Air Quality Data - Bulk Request # Getting Started You need to [signup](https://www.weatherapi.com/signup.aspx) and then you can find your API key under [your account](https://www.weatherapi.com/login.aspx), and start using API right away! Try our weather API by using interactive [API Explorer](https://www.weatherapi.com/api-explorer.aspx). We also have SDK for popular framework/languages available on [Github](https://github.com/weatherapicom/) for quick integrations. If you find any features missing or have any suggestions, please [contact us](https://www.weatherapi.com/contact.aspx). # Authentication API access to the data is protected by an API key. If at anytime, you find the API key has become vulnerable, please regenerate the key using Regenerate button next to the API key. Authentication to the WeatherAPI.com API is provided by passing your API key as request parameter through an API . ## key parameter key=YOUR API KEY

16 Iterations available to view
Iteration: 1 - Realtime API
Request Description
Current weather or realtime weather API method allows a user to get up to date current weather information in json and xml. The data is returned as a Current Object.<br /><br />Current object contains current or realtime weather information for a given city.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/current.json?q=New%20York&lang={{lang}}&key={{apiKey}}
Response Information
Response Code: 404 - Not Found
Mean time per request: 444ms
Mean size per request: 0B

Iteration: 1 - Forecast API
Request Description
Forecast weather API method returns, depending upon your price plan level, upto next 14 day weather forecast and weather alert as json or xml. The data is returned as a Forecast Object.<br /><br />Forecast object contains astronomy data, day weather forecast and hourly interval weather information for a given city.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/forecast.json?q=New%20York&days={{days}}&dt=2024-06-30&unixdt={{unixdt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&alerts={{alerts}}&aqi={{aqi}}&tp={{tp}}&key={{apiKey}}
Response Information

Iteration: 1 - Future API
Request Description
Future weather API method returns weather in a 3 hourly interval in future for a date between 14 days and 365 days from today in the future.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/future.json?q=New%20York&dt=2024-06-30&lang={{lang}}&key={{apiKey}}

Iteration: 1 - History API
Request Description
History weather API method returns historical weather for a date on or after 1st Jan, 2010 as json. The data is returned as a Forecast Object.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/history.json?q=New%20York&dt=2024-06-30&unixdt={{unixdt}}&end_dt={{end_dt}}&unixend_dt={{unixend_dt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&key={{apiKey}}

Iteration: 1 - Marine Weather API
Request Description
Marine weather API method returns upto next 7 day (depending upon your price plan level) marine and sailing weather forecast and tide data (depending upon your price plan level) as json or xml. The data is returned as a Marine Object.<br /><br />Marine object, depending upon your price plan level, contains astronomy data, day weather forecast and hourly interval weather information and tide data for a given sea/ocean point.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/marine.json?q=New%20York&days={{days}}&dt=2024-06-30&unixdt={{unixdt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&key={{apiKey}}

Request Description
Current weather or realtime weather API method allows a user to get up to date current weather information in json and xml. The data is returned as a Current Object.<br /><br />Current object contains current or realtime weather information for a given city.

Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/current.json?q=London&lang={{lang}}&key={{apiKey}}

Iteration: 2 - Forecast API
Request Description
Forecast weather API method returns, depending upon your price plan level, upto next 14 day weather forecast and weather alert as json or xml. The data is returned as a Forecast Object.<br /><br />Forecast object contains astronomy data, day weather forecast and hourly interval weather information for a given city.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/forecast.json?q=London&days={{days}}&dt=2024-06-26&unixdt={{unixdt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&alerts={{alerts}}&aqi={{aqi}}&tp={{tp}}&key={{apiKey}}
Response Information
Response Code: 404 - Not Found
Mean time per request: 161ms
Mean size per request: 0B

Iteration: 2 - Future API
Request Description
Future weather API method returns weather in a 3 hourly interval in future for a date between 14 days and 365 days from today in the future.

Iteration: 2 - History API
Request Description
History weather API method returns historical weather for a date on or after 1st Jan, 2010 as json. The data is returned as a Forecast Object.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/history.json?q=London&dt=2024-06-26&unixdt={{unixdt}}&end_dt={{end_dt}}&unixend_dt={{unixend_dt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&key={{apiKey}}

Iteration: 3 - Marine Weather API
Request Description
Marine weather API method returns upto next 7 day (depending upon your price plan level) marine and sailing weather forecast and tide data (depending upon your price plan level) as json or xml. The data is returned as a Marine Object.<br /><br />Marine object, depending upon your price plan level, contains astronomy data, day weather forecast and hourly interval weather information and tide data for a given sea/ocean point.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/marine.json?q=Tokyo&days={{days}}&dt={{dt}}&unixdt={{unixdt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&key={{apiKey}}

Iteration: 4 - Forecast API
Request Description
Forecast weather API method returns, depending upon your price plan level, upto next 14 day weather forecast and weather alert as json or xml. The data is returned as a Forecast Object.<br /><br />Forecast object contains astronomy data, day weather forecast and hourly interval weather information for a given city.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/forecast.json?q=Berlin&days={{days}}&dt=2024-06-29&unixdt={{unixdt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&alerts={{alerts}}&aqi={{aqi}}&tp={{tp}}&key={{apiKey}}

Iteration: 5 - Marine Weather API
Request Description
Marine weather API method returns upto next 7 day (depending upon your price plan level) marine and sailing weather forecast and tide data (depending upon your price plan level) as json or xml. The data is returned as a Marine Object.<br /><br />Marine object, depending upon your price plan level, contains astronomy data, day weather forecast and hourly interval weather information and tide data for a given sea/ocean point.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/marine.json?q=Sydney&days={{days}}&dt={{dt}}&unixdt={{unixdt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&key={{apiKey}}

Iteration: 6 - Forecast API
Request Description
Forecast weather API method returns, depending upon your price plan level, upto next 14 day weather forecast and weather alert as json or xml. The data is returned as a Forecast Object.<br /><br />Forecast object contains astronomy data, day weather forecast and hourly interval weather information for a given city.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/forecast.json?q=Paris&days={{days}}&dt=2024-06-25&unixdt={{unixdt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&alerts={{alerts}}&aqi={{aqi}}&tp={{tp}}&key={{apiKey}}

Iteration: 7 - Forecast API
Request Description
Forecast weather API method returns, depending upon your price plan level, upto next 14 day weather forecast and weather alert as json or xml. The data is returned as a Forecast Object.<br /><br />Forecast object contains astronomy data, day weather forecast and hourly interval weather information for a given city.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/forecast.json?q={{q}}&days={{days}}&dt=2024-06-30&unixdt={{unixdt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&alerts={{alerts}}&aqi={{aqi}}&tp={{tp}}&key={{apiKey}}

Iteration: 7 - Marine Weather API
Request Description
Marine weather API method returns upto next 7 day (depending upon your price plan level) marine and sailing weather forecast and tide data (depending upon your price plan level) as json or xml. Iteration: 9 - Forecast API
Request Description
Forecast weather API method returns, depending upon your price plan level, upto next 14 day weather forecast and weather alert as json or xml. The data is returned as a Forecast Object.<br /><br />Forecast object contains astronomy data, day weather forecast and hourly interval weather information for a given city.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/forecast.json?q=FakeCity123&days={{days}}&dt=2024-06-23&unixdt={{unixdt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&alerts={{alerts}}&aqi={{aqi}}&tp={{tp}}&key={{apiKey}}

Request Description
History weather API method returns historical weather for a date on or after 1st Jan, 2010 as json. The data is returned as a Forecast Object.

Iteration: 9 - Marine Weather API
Request Description
Marine weather API method returns upto next 7 day (depending upon your price plan level) marine and sailing weather forecast and tide data (depending upon your price plan level) as json or xml. The data is returned as a Marine Object.<br /><br />Marine object, depending upon your price plan level, contains astronomy data, day weather forecast and hourly interval weather information and tide data for a given sea/ocean point.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/marine.json?q=FakeCity123&days={{days}}&dt=2024-06-23&unixdt={{unixdt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&key={{apiKey}}

Iteration: 11 - Forecast API
Request Description
Forecast weather API method returns, depending upon your price plan level, upto next 14 day weather forecast and weather alert as json or xml. The data is returned as a Forecast Object.<br /><br />Forecast object contains astronomy data, day weather forecast and hourly interval weather information for a given city.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/forecast.json?q=London&days={{days}}&dt=2024/06/25&unixdt={{unixdt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&alerts={{alerts}}&aqi={{aqi}}&tp={{tp}}&key={{apiKey}}

Iteration: 11 - History API
Request Description
History weather API method returns historical weather for a date on or after 1st Jan, 2010 as json. The data is returned as a Forecast Object.

Iteration: 11 - Marine Weather API
Request Description
Marine weather API method returns upto next 7 day (depending upon your price plan level) marine and sailing weather forecast and tide data (depending upon your price plan level) as json or xml. The data is returned as a Marine Object.<br /><br />Marine object, depending upon your price plan level, contains astronomy data, day weather forecast and hourly interval weather information and tide data for a given sea/ocean point.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/marine.json?q=London&days={{days}}&dt=2024/06/25&unixdt={{unixdt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&key={{apiKey}}

Request Description
Current weather or realtime weather API method allows a user to get up to date current weather information in json and xml. The data is returned as a Current Object.<br /><br />Current object contains current or realtime weather information for a given city.

Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/current.json?q=London&lang={{lang}}&key={{apiKey}}

Iteration: 13 - Forecast API
Request Description
Forecast weather API method returns, depending upon your price plan level, upto next 14 day weather forecast and weather alert as json or xml. The data is returned as a Forecast Object.<br /><br />Forecast object contains astronomy data, day weather forecast and hourly interval weather information for a given city.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/forecast.json?q=London&days={{days}}&dt={{dt}}&unixdt={{unixdt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&alerts={{alerts}}&aqi={{aqi}}&tp={{tp}}&key={{apiKey}}
Response Information
Response Code: 404 - Not Found
Mean time per request: 150ms
Mean size per request: 0B

Request Description
Future weather API method returns weather in a 3 hourly interval in future for a date between 14 days and 365 days from today in the future.

Iteration: 13 - History API
Request Description
History weather API method returns historical weather for a date on or after 1st Jan, 2010 as json. The data is returned as a Forecast Object.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/history.json?q=London&dt={{dt}}&unixdt={{unixdt}}&end_dt={{end_dt}}&unixend_dt={{unixend_dt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&key={{apiKey}}

Iteration: 13 - Marine Weather API
Request Description
Marine weather API method returns upto next 7 day (depending upon your price plan level) marine and sailing weather forecast and tide data (depending upon your price plan level) as json or xml. The data is returned as a Marine Object.<br /><br />Marine object, depending upon your price plan level, contains astronomy data, day weather forecast and hourly interval weather information and tide data for a given sea/ocean point.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/marine.json?q=London&days={{days}}&dt={{dt}}&unixdt={{unixdt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&key={{apiKey}}

Request Description
Current weather or realtime weather API method allows a user to get up to date current weather information in json and xml. The data is returned as a Current Object.<br /><br />Current object contains current or realtime weather information for a given city.

Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/current.json?q=Sydney&lang={{lang}}&key={{apiKey}}

Iteration: 15 - Forecast API
Request Description
Forecast weather API method returns, depending upon your price plan level, upto next 14 day weather forecast and weather alert as json or xml. The data is returned as a Forecast Object.<br /><br />Forecast object contains astronomy data, day weather forecast and hourly interval weather information for a given city.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/forecast.json?q=Sydney&days={{days}}&dt=2024-06-22&unixdt={{unixdt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&alerts={{alerts}}&aqi={{aqi}}&tp={{tp}}&key={{apiKey}}
Response Information
Response Code: 404 - Not Found
Mean time per request: 240ms
Mean size per request: 0B

Future weather API method returns weather in a 3 hourly interval in future for a date between 14 days and 365 days from today in the future.

Iteration: 15 - History API
Request Description
History weather API method returns historical weather for a date on or after 1st Jan, 2010 as json. The data is returned as a Forecast Object.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/history.json?q=Sydney&dt=2024-06-22&unixdt={{unixdt}}&end_dt={{end_dt}}&unixend_dt={{unixend_dt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&key={{apiKey}}

Iteration: 15 - Marine Weather API
Request Description
Marine weather API method returns upto next 7 day (depending upon your price plan level) marine and sailing weather forecast and tide data (depending upon your price plan level) as json or xml. The data is returned as a Marine Object.<br /><br />Marine object, depending upon your price plan level, contains astronomy data, day weather forecast and hourly interval weather information and tide data for a given sea/ocean point.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/marine.json?q=Sydney&days={{days}}&dt=2024-06-22&unixdt={{unixdt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&key={{apiKey}}

Request Description
Marine weather API method returns upto next 7 day (depending upon your price plan level) marine and sailing weather forecast and tide data (depending upon your price plan level) as json or xml. The data is returned as a Marine Object.<br /><br />Marine object, depending upon your price plan level, contains astronomy data, day weather forecast and hourly interval weather information and tide data for a given sea/ocean point.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.weatherapi.com/marine.json?q=Berlin&days={{days}}&dt={{dt}}&unixdt={{unixdt}}&hour={{hour}}&lang={{lang}}&key={{apiKey}}
Response Information
Response Code: 404 - Not Found
Mean time per request: 144ms
Mean size per request: 0B
Test Pass Percentage
No Tests for this request
